commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=2c75516230ec33af4fd29c16a32c2ba6ca0f6db5)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a one-retry recovery path and visible error for `message_tool_only` runs where the assistant writes the source reply only as private final text, plus prompt and regression-test updates.

PR surface: Source +123, Tests +81. Total +204 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review findings from source inspection: the PR guard uses broad message-tool evidence, runs before the planning-only retry path, and treats any nonempty final text as visible. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Manual review is needed because the PR requires contributor/live proof and a correction to source-reply delivery semantics that ClawSweeper cannot prove from the contributor setup.

target.title: Recover message-tool-only private final replies
target.body:
## Summary
- Retry once when a `message_tool_only` source reply is written as private final text instead of being sent with the message tool.
- If the retry still does not produce message-tool delivery evidence, return a visible runtime error payload instead of letting the source conversation stay silent.
- Tighten the source-reply prompt wording so final-only answers are explicitly called out as private in this mode.

## Context
This targets the narrow failure mode from #87455: in `message_tool_only` delivery mode, a model can write the user-facing answer only as private final text. That answer is intentionally not delivered to the source channel, so the source conversation appears stuck even though the model produced text.

This PR keeps the message tool as the delivery path. It does not republish private final text as a source reply; it gives the agent one replay-safe chance to send the reply through the message tool, then fails visibly if it still does not.

## Validation
- `corepack pnpm format:check -- src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/incomplete-turn.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.incomplete-turn.test.ts src/agents/system-prompt.ts src/agents/system-prompt.test.ts`
- `corepack pnpm test:changed -- src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.incomplete-turn.test.ts src/agents/system-prompt.test.ts`
- `corepack pnpm prompt:snapshots:check`
- `CI=1 corepack pnpm check:changed -- src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/incomplete-turn.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.incomplete-turn.test.ts src/agents/system-prompt.ts src/agents/system-prompt.test.ts`

Replaces #87455 with a smaller PR focused only on the original runtime fix.
target.author: tosko4
